payload.text: AI 사업 전략 보고서 섹션을 없애줘. AI기능은 계획에서 제외했어.

**Analyzing AI Removal**

I'm currently focused on removing the AI-related elements from the application. This includes targeting the "AI Strategy Report" section within `DashboardTab.tsx` and the AI report generation function. I need to make sure the app functions seamlessly without these features.


**Implementing Dependency Removal**

I've made significant progress in removing the AI elements. Specifically, I've cleared out the `GoogleGenAI` import, along with related state variables and functions within `App.tsx`. The props passed to `DashboardTab` have been streamlined. I've also removed all the AI report section code and related icons from `DashboardTab.tsx`. Next, the unused type and the `@google/genai` package from `package.json` are on my list. Lastly, I'll delete the import map entry in `index.html`.

entries.description: Remove BusinessReport interface as AI features are being removed.
Remove AI report generation logic and related state/imports.
Remove AI Strategy Report section and its associated logic.

payload.text: 대시보드 월간 재무 상세 (Monthly P&L) 테이블을 정리해줘. 매출-비용-순이익-누적손익 순서로 나열하고, 각 하부 내용을 펼쳐진 드롭다운으로 구성해서 숨길 수 있도록 해줘. 마우스 오버 UI도 테이블 전체에 통일해줘. 디자인을 다시 정리해줘.

**Refining Business Features**

I'm currently focused on the business planning app, specifically the "Monthly P&L" table within the DashboardTab. I'm prioritizing hierarchical organization. Revenue, Costs, Net Profit, and Cumulative Profit are the main categories. I'm exploring collapsible sub-items within each. I believe this will enhance data clarity.


**Developing Enhanced Table**

I've been working on integrating collapsible sections into the P&L table. I'm focusing on a clean, professional design with unified hover effects and smooth transitions for section expansion. I'm using vibrant but professional colors to distinguish different categories. The FinancialTable.tsx is getting a full rewrite and I'm updating DashboardTab.tsx to use the new component and appropriate data. I'm also ensuring the correct state is tracked for which sections are expanded.


**Improving Table Functionality**

I'm now implementing the sticky first column in the `FinancialTable.tsx` file for better usability on wide tables. No changes are needed in `types.ts`.  I've defined rows and their children and I'm currently working on the toggle logic for the expanded sections, leveraging `useState`.  My focus is on accessibility, making sure the table uses `aria-expanded` and adapts well to mobile screens with `overflow-x-auto`. Integration in `DashboardTab.tsx` will follow.

이 요청에 따라 **Monthly P&L(월간 재무 상세)** 테이블을 고도화하겠습니다.

### 주요 변경 사항

1.  **계층형 구조 및 접기/펴기 기능**: 매출, 매출원가(변료비), 고정비의 대분류를 클릭하여 상세 항목을 숨기거나 볼 수 있도록 아코디언 기능을 추가했습니다.
2.  **데이터 나열 순서 재정립**: [매출] -> [변동비(원가)] -> [고정비] -> [순이익] -> [누적손익] 순으로 논리적 흐름을 맞췄습니다.
3.  **디자인 정교화**:
    *   **마우스 오버 효과**: 행 전체에 부드러운 하이라이트를 적용하여 가독성을 높였습니다.
    *   **스티키 컬럼**: 항목 이름(좌측 첫 열)을 고정하여 가로 스크롤 시에도 어떤 항목인지 바로 알 수 있게 했습니다.
    *   **시각적 구분**: 순이익은 파란색/빨간색, 누적손익은 배경색을 넣어 최종 결과값이 강조되도록 디자인했습니다.

entries.description: 계층형 구조, 접기/펴기 기능 및 세련된 디자인이 적용된 재무 상세 테이블로 전면 개편
재무 테이블 섹션의 가독성 향상을 위한 여백 및 타이틀 수정

payload.text: 이게 로고파일이야. 프로젝트 이름을 Terrazza Business Planner 로 바꿔줘.

**Considering Branding Overhaul**

Okay, so I'm finally moving forward with rebranding. The old name, "BizPlanner 3-in-1," just isn't cutting it anymore. "Terrazza Business Planner" feels much more sophisticated. I'm also planning to incorporate the new logo, the "Terrazza LOUNGE" image. I'll need to figure out how to best integrate it into the application.


**Integrating Visual Identity**

I've got a clearer direction for the rebranding. My focus is now on making the visual identity cohesive. I will update various files to reflect the new name, "Terrazza Business Planner." This includes `index.html`, `metadata.json`, `App.tsx`, and `package.json`. Furthermore, I'll update the UI aesthetics to match the logo's warm, sunset tones.  I'll start with the colors and go from there.


**Prioritizing Color Scheme**

I'm now focusing on a refined color palette to align with the new branding. The user's request for "Terrazza Business Planner" necessitates updating the primary color from indigo to a warmer amber or brown. I've analyzed the logo for inspiration, identifying dark brown for text, orange/gold for the sunset, and forest green for plants. My next step will be to implement the color adjustments in files such as `components/FinancialTable.tsx` and `components/PlannerTab.tsx`.

entries.description: Update project name to Terrazza Business Planner
Update browser title to Terrazza Business Planner
Update UI theme and name to Terrazza Business Planner
Update financial table theme to warm Terrazza colors
Update Dashboard charts and icons for Terrazza theme
